title: The Little Kidnappers
actors: Jon Whiteley, Vincent Winter, Adrienne Corri
plot: A Scotsman, Jim MacKenzie, living on a primitive homestead in Nova Scotia, is raising his two grandsons, Harry and Davy, following the death of their father in the Boer War. His son's death has developed antagonism by MacKenzie to...
awards: Nominated for 3 BAFTA 3 wins & 4 nominations total
